title: meridiana quadrifida
intro: Meridiana quadrifida, also known as the Four-angled Milkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is a woody climber with milky latex that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Meridiana quadrifida is often used as a tincture, infusion, or ointment to harness its medicinal benefits and support overall health and well-being.
